phone_presence_notes: Friendly opener and conversational tone but customer's name was never established or used, and warmth was inconsistent across the long out-of-town logistics discussion.
top_strength: Thorough probe for complex out-of-town packing move — covered garage, packing scope, appliances, overnight vs. hold-in-Dallas tradeoff.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass completely skipped and clock missed minimum and prorate — two high-value protection sections left out.
